display.purpose: Page titles, episode names, major section headers. Space Grotesk at clamp(2.25rem, 5vw, 3.75rem).

headline.purpose: Card titles, crew names, lore entry headings. Space Grotesk at 1.875rem.

title.purpose: Subsection headers, navigation labels. Space Grotesk at 1.25rem.

body.purpose: Episode descriptions, lore text, crew bios. Inter at 1rem, max 72ch line length.

mono.purpose: Station-generated content only: boot sequences, status logs, terminal output. JetBrains Mono.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default for color and opacity transitions.

motion.name: ease-terminal
motion.purpose: Text float-in animations in terminal output.

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Desktop navigation links in the fixed header.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #9090b0; transition: color 0.3s ease; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #00d4ff; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00d4ff; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Nav Terminal Button
components.description: The amber STATION TERMINAL CTA in the nav bar.
components.css: .ds-nav-terminal { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #ffb020; border: 1px solid #2a2a3a; padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 4px; transition: all 0.3s ease; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-terminal:hover { color: #00d4ff; border-color: #00d4ff; }

components.name: Crew Card
components.description: Character profile card on the crew manifest page.
components.html:
Pixel Paradox

Captain

"Quote text."
[VIEW FILE]
components.css: .ds-card-crew { background: rgba(18, 18, 25, 0.3); border: 1px solid #2a2a3a; border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.5rem; transition: border-color 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease; } .ds-card-crew:hover { border-color: #00d4ff; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card-accent-bar { height: 4px; border-radius: 2px 2px 0 0; margin-bottom: 1rem; background-color: #00d4ff; } .ds-card-role { color: #00d4ff; font-size: 0.875rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .ds-card-crew blockquote { border-left: 2px solid rgba(255, 176, 32, 0.5); padding-left: 0.75rem; font-style: italic; color: #9090b0; font-size: 0.875rem; margin: 0.75rem 0; } .ds-card-crew a { color: #00d4ff; font-size: 0.875rem; margin-top: 1rem; display: inline-block; text-decoration: none; } .ds-card-crew a:hover { opacity: 0.8; }

components.name: Lore Card
components.description: Lore entry card on the Atlas page with spoiler chip support.
components.css: .ds-card-lore { background: rgba(18, 18, 25, 0.4); border: 1px solid #2a2a3a; border-radius: 12px; padding: 1rem; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease; } .ds-card-lore:hover { border-color: #00d4ff; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card-lore h3 { color: #e8e8f0; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .ds-card-lore p { color: #9090b0; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary button with border and no fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: transparent; border: 1px solid #2a2a3a; color: #e8e8f0; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #00d4ff; color: #00d4ff; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00d4ff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button with solid cyan fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: #00d4ff; color: #08080d; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 4px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s ease, color 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #e040fb; color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00d4ff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Chip Tag
components.description: Spoiler-level tags and lore taxonomy chips.
components.css: .ds-chip-tag { background: rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.1); color: #00d4ff; font-size: 0.75rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Scanline Overlay
components.description: CRT scanline effect applied to terminal pages. Non-interactive fixed overlay.
components.css: .ds-scanlines { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none; z-index: 1000; background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.15) 0px, rgba(0,0,0,0.15) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 2px); }

components.name: Mobile Menu
components.description: Slide-in mobile navigation panel with staggered link reveals.
components.css: .ds-mobile-menu { position: fixed; top: 0; right: 0; width: 75%; max-width: 320px; height: 100%; background: rgba(8, 8, 13, 0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(24px); z-index: 999; transform: translateX(100%); transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); flex-direction: column; padding: 5rem 2rem 2rem; display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; } .ds-mobile-menu.open { transform: translateX(0); } .ds-mobile-link { color: rgba(232, 232, 240, 0.8); font-size: 1.125rem; text-decoration: none; opacity: 0; transform: translate(20px); transition: all 0.3s ease; } .ds-mobile-menu.open .ds-mobile-link { opacity: 1; transform: translate(0); } .ds-mobile-menu.open .ds-mobile-link:nth-child(1) { transition-delay: 80ms; } .ds-mobile-menu.open .ds-mobile-link:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 160ms; } .ds-mobile-menu.open .ds-mobile-link:nth-child(3) { transition-delay: 240ms; } .ds-mobile-menu.open .ds-mobile-link:nth-child(4) { transition-delay: 320ms; }

narrative.overview: Ephergent.com is a living broadcast log from a station that has been transmitting for 800 years into an ocean of impossible light. The interface feels like equipment running past its intended lifespan, still functional, still reaching outward. A deep-space radio telescope crossed with an IBM 3270 mainframe. Not sleek, not corporate, not futuristic in the generic sense. Amber carries warmth (station voice); cyan carries interactivity (signal). The dual-accent phosphor palette is not decorative — it reflects two frequencies.
keyCharacteristics: Deep-space CRT phosphor aesthetic with purposeful dual-accent color system
No shadows at rest; depth through tonal layering and colored borders
Terminal-inspired typography (JetBrains Mono for output, Space Grotesk for display, Inter for body)
Atmospheric status messaging in footers and boot sequences reinforces world-building
Flat system: hover states use border color shifts and subtle translate transforms, not shadows

rules.name: The Dual Frequency Rule
rules.body: Amber marks the station's voice (labels, headers, status). Cyan marks the user's voice (links, interactive, signal). They never swap roles.

rules.name: The Near-Black Background Rule
rules.body: The primary surface is #08080d, not #000. Tint every neutral toward the brand hue by 0.005-0.01 chroma. No pure blacks.

rules.name: The Scale Ratio Rule
rules.body: Display-to-headline ratio is approximately 2:1. Never use a flat scale where every heading is the same weight and size. Hierarchy is earned.

rules.name: The Mono Voice Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono is reserved for station-generated content (boot sequences, status logs, terminal output). It is not used decoratively on body text or for general UI labels.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Borders and background color shifts replace shadows as the depth signal.

dos: Do use the dual-accent system: amber for station voice, cyan for user voice
Do apply scanlines as a fixed-position pseudo-element with pointer-events: none
Do use status-green (#00e676) only for confirmation states: [OK] markers, online indicators
Do use JetBrains Mono exclusively for station-generated content
Do use rgba(18, 18, 25, 0.3) as crew card surface with 4px colored accent top border per crew character
Do use backdrop-blur-xl on mobile menu and backdrop-blur-sm on fixed header
donts: Don't use pure black (#000) or pure white (#fff) anywhere
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe
Don't use background-clip: text with gradient backgrounds for decorative text
Don't use glassmorphism as a decorative card treatment
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number + small label + gradient accent)
Don't use identical card grids with no differentiation
Don't use modals as a first solution
Don't use generic sci-fi color palettes (dark blue + neon green, purple gradients on black)
Don't use em dashes in UI copy
